content:
🌟 mgrep | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a semantic, natural-language search interface for local files and web content, enhancing developer productivity and AI agent capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Natural-language search • Semantic, multilingual, and multimodal search capabilities • Built-in web search (`--web` flag) • Background indexing with `mgrep watch`
📖 Summary: mgrep is a command-line tool that enables semantic searching across various file types, including code, text, and PDFs, by indexing them locally. It offers natural language querying, web search integration, and background indexing for continuous updates, making it suitable for both human developers and AI agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
